$schema_note: Anthropic Claude Desktop .dxt extension manifest. Schema is still in flux at the time of authoring (Q1 build); we lock dxt_version to '0.1' as the conservative baseline. If/when Anthropic ships a stable schema reference and the field names diverge, this file should be regenerated to match — keep server.type=http, the user_config prompt fields, and the tools list as the source of truth.
name: gluecron
description: AI-native git hosting. Claude can open PRs, review code, merge, manage issues, and ship — all on Gluecron.
long_description: Gluecron is the git host built around Claude. This extension gives Claude 15 tools to read and write against your Gluecron-hosted repos: open and merge PRs, file and comment on issues, search code, list and read files, get health reports, drive your AI-native development loop end-to-end. No more switching between Claude and a browser tab.

gluecron_pat.title: Personal access token
gluecron_pat.description: Generate one at <host>/settings/tokens with admin scope (needed for write tools).

tools.name: gluecron_repo_search
tools.description: Search public Gluecron repositories by keyword.

tools.name: gluecron_repo_read_file
tools.description: Read a file from a Gluecron repo at a ref.

tools.name: gluecron_repo_list_issues
tools.description: List open issues for a repo.

tools.name: gluecron_repo_explain_codebase
tools.description: Get the AI explain-this-codebase Markdown for a repo.

tools.name: gluecron_repo_health
tools.description: Compute the current health score for a repo.

tools.name: gluecron_create_pr
tools.description: Open a pull request from head into base.

tools.name: gluecron_get_pr
tools.description: Read a PR's metadata + state + mergeable hint.

tools.name: gluecron_merge_pr
tools.description: Merge a PR (gated on branch protection + AI review + risk score).
